title: UK Hydrographic Office 2024-2025 Annual Report released
body: "The UK Hydrographic Office (UKHO) has released its Annual Report and Accounts for 2024 to 2025.  This document contains a performance review against the corporate plan, governance arrangements and financial statements for the financial year 2024-2025. The report also includes a sustainability report and case studies showcasing successes from across the organisation.  The UKHO is an executive agency of the Ministry of Defence and a trading fund, meaning it operates as a self-funded organisation at no additional cost to the taxpayer.  This paper was laid before Parliament in response to a legislative requirement or as a Return to an Address and was ordered to be printed by the House of Commons. "
